---
author: "Tobias Zeier"
date: "2026"

---

# Declaration {.unnumbered}

I, **\[Your Full Name\]**, confirm that the work presented in this thesis is my own. Where information has been derived from other sources, I confirm that this has been indicated in the thesis.

\vspace{2cm}

**Signed:** \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

**Date:** `22 Fabruary 2026`

# Acknowledgements {.unnumbered}

I would like to thank my supervisor, \[Supervisor Name\], for their invaluable guidance throughout this research. I also express my gratitude to the IT professionals who participated in the interviews and surveys, providing the empirical data that made this study possible.

# Keywords {.unnumbered}

Enterprise IT Management, Cloud Governance, Strategic Alignment, UK Financial Services, ITIL 4, COBIT 2019.

# Preface {.unnumbered}

This thesis is submitted in partial fulfillment of the requirements for the degree of Master of Science (MSc) in Enterprise IT Management at the University of \[Your University\].
